generation_config.note: Original generation was single-pass per prompt (no LLM retry loop, testbenches not consulted during generation). The checked-in generated/ corpus for v4 includes a human-applied edge-case fix to sign_magnitude_adder4 after a confirmed sim mismatch; see pipeline/measure_pre_fix_delta.py and VALIDATION_REPORT.md. This is NOT an automated LLM self-correction / tool-feedback loop.
generation_config.temperature: n/a (single deterministic pass per prompt at generation time)
generation_config.system_prompt: You are an expert Verilog RTL designer. Given a module specification, write a single synthesizable Verilog module implementing exactly the described interface and behavior. Output only the Verilog module code.
